paper_type: Cross-sectional study (anti-VEGF injections and optic nerve head parameters)

abstract.notes: All numerical data correct. Slightly verbose (282 vs 210 words). Good structured format. Includes excess methodological detail better suited for Methods.

introduction.notes: Well-structured funnel progression. 4 paragraphs vs original's 2. Independent organization. Adds appropriate epidemiological context. Misses some breadth (other VEGF-treated diseases) that was in the original but not the bundle.

methods.notes: Excellent subsection organization (6 subsections vs 1 block). All methodological details correct. Adds 'spectral-domain' qualifier appropriately. Ethics committee identifier correctly anonymized.

results.notes: 28/28 data points correct. 5 formal tables added (improvement over original's running text). RNFL vs injections table simplified but correctly reflects available data. Strictly descriptive per guidelines.

discussion.notes: Well-organized thematic subsections. Adds Study Strengths (not in original). Expanded Limitations (5 vs 1). Missing specific study comparisons and VEGF mechanistic detail (extraction-limited). General-knowledge additions are factually accurate but unverifiable from bundle.

conclusions.notes: More comprehensive than original (130 vs 60 words). Includes actionable clinical recommendation (MRW monitoring). Appropriate call for longitudinal studies.

blind_integrity.structural_mirroring_detail: Substantially different organization: 4-para intro vs 2, 6 methods subsections vs 1, tabulated results vs running text, headed discussion subsections vs unheaded paragraphs, added Strengths section
blind_integrity.phrasing_overlap_detail: 0/19 distinctive original phrases found verbatim. Partial overlaps limited to standard academic vocabulary (more sensitive marker, longitudinal studies, warranted)
blind_integrity.knowledge_leakage_detail: 0/18 original-specific Discussion items found in draft. General-knowledge additions (lamina cribrosa, 0.05 mL, >40 mmHg) are NOT in the original paper, confirming independent generation
blind_integrity.verdict_detail: No evidence of access to original paper. Structure, phrasing, and knowledge content are independently generated. Draft adds concepts the original does not mention, further confirming independence.

iteration_comparison.trend: Continued improvement. 100% numerical accuracy maintained for 3rd consecutive iteration. Structural organization is the strongest yet. Remaining ceiling is extraction-limited Discussion depth.
